description_long: This is a small, round bread roll with a rustic, artisan appearance. The crust is golden-brown with a dusting of white flour, giving it a slightly mottled look. The surface is uneven and textured, with some cracks and folds, suggesting a hand-shaped preparation. One side reveals a dark spot, likely a chocolate chip or dried fruit embedded in the dough, adding visual interest and hinting at a sweet filling. The bread appears dense but soft, with a thick, chewy crust and a slightly flattened dome shape. There are no visible brand markings, packaging, or slices, and the bread looks freshly baked.
description: A rustic, round bread roll with a golden-brown, flour-dusted crust and a visible dark filling spot. The surface is uneven and hand-shaped, with no visible branding or packaging.
description_view_0: The top and side of the bread are visible, showing a golden-brown, flour-dusted crust with a prominent fold and a dark spot near the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the dark filling spot and a rough, torn section of the crust, emphasizing the bread's rustic texture.
description_view_2: The top-down view displays the rounded dome and the mottled flour pattern, with minimal visible filling.
description_view_3: The rear and underside are shown, with a more uniform brown crust and a rough, slightly indented base.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, uneven texture with a light dusting of white flour and some natural cracks and folds. There are no visible scores or seeds, giving it a handmade, artisan appearance.
